experiments.title: Dot Interactive
experiments.description: A dense halftone field that reacts to your cursor — dots swell and brighten wherever you hover, rippling outward like light catching a printed surface. Tune the grid rotation and cell count to find your pattern.

experiments.title: MSDF Text & Fluidsim
experiments.description: A phrase rendered in MSDF text repeats across the screen, colored and offset based on mouse position, creating a fluid effect that shifts through different color tones against a black background.

experiments.title: Bichromatic grain post pass
experiments.description: A scene rendered as a two-color duotone with layered grain. Controls let you adjust contrast, tint, background color, max brightness, and noise intensity.

experiments.title: Joyco Miami
experiments.description: A sun-bleached Miami wall tagged with JOYCO graffiti, built in Three.js. Hover your mouse across the scene and the spray cans scattered on the street roll and nudge — lazy, physical, a little alive. Street art as interactive still life.

experiments.title: Scene Scissor Clip
experiments.description: Controlled dual scene rendering with clipping capabilities

experiments.title: SDF SVG Playground
experiments.description: Drop an SVG and tweak the shader
